storyInfo: Gnosis goes to the Rhine Lab observation station to inquire about the cause of the Catastrophe. Elena discovers that observation records from before the Catastrophe have been altered, and a researcher, Carolin, has gone missing. Just then, an angry Kjerag mob surrounds the station.

attributes.content: <p=1>Rhine Lab Observation Station, Kjerag</><p=2>Two months ago</>
attributes.name: group_location_stamp

attributes.content: That was fast... an observation station of this size, built in such a short period of time...
attributes.name: Muelsyse

attributes.content: Business must have cried tears of blood when they approved the budget.
attributes.name: Muelsyse

attributes.content: Actually, we got more sponsorship offers from financial institutions than we could handle the moment the committee approved the Kjerag observation station.
attributes.name: Silence

attributes.content: If anything, funding was the least of our worries on this project.
attributes.name: Silence

attributes.content: Honestly, Silence... I didn't expect the committee to approve the proposal that easily.
attributes.name: Muelsyse

attributes.content: I had my reservations. I still think Rhine Lab is too adventurous with regard to research into the Starpod. There are numerous potential risks that we have not fully considered.
attributes.name: Silence

attributes.content: But I also recognize that the stability I hope for may never come.
attributes.name: Silence

attributes.content: At the end of the day, it's the specific people in whom we place our trust.
attributes.name: Silence

attributes.content: Well then... thank you for your trust, Silence of the Scientific Ethics Consensus Committee.
attributes.name: Muelsyse

attributes.content: I hope what we're doing is worth it...
attributes.name: Silence

attributes.content: Of course it is. This station is a unique opportunity for the company.
attributes.name: Muelsyse

attributes.content: In addition to the Starpod research, the low-Originium environment of Kjerag also offers a rare opportunity for biological research. Not to mention Maryam has wanted to visit Karlan for ages!
attributes.name: Muelsyse

attributes.content: Even Ferdinand came up with the proposal for the station's core power supply just two weeks after we got approval.
attributes.name: Muelsyse

attributes.content: Of course, he buried his head in his theoretical research right after that. Elena from Energy is handling the actual implementation.
attributes.name: Muelsyse

attributes.content: Let's hope our interactions with Kjerag go as smoothly.
attributes.name: Silence

attributes.content: I believe there will be no need to worry about that.
The door to the observation station opens from the outside. The visitor flicks away the snow that has fallen on his shoulders and walks in.
We meet again, Mr. Edelweiss.
attributes.name: Muelsyse

attributes.content: Just a regular visit to see if you need anything for the construction of the station.
attributes.name: Gnosis

attributes.content: It seems like things are progressing quite smoothly.
attributes.name: Gnosis

attributes.content: Gnosis looks up at the bright lights installed on the spacious ceiling of the station.
Rhine Lab and Karlan Trade have worked together to build this little temple, sturdy and bright, in an astonishingly short period of time.
Compared to the houses of Kjerag, its bold, futuristic design might as well have come from another world.
Karlan Trade will do everything in our power to assist Rhine Lab's observation project, and provide any assistance necessary outside of the scope of work.
attributes.name: Gnosis

attributes.content: As long as the terms agreed in the treaty are upheld, you will enjoy maximum freedom to conduct your activities in Kjerag.
attributes.name: Gnosis

attributes.content: Thank you for your generosity, Mr. Edelweiss.
attributes.name: Silence

attributes.content: Research has always been the sole purpose of Rhine Lab. We have no reason to violate the treaty.
attributes.name: Silence

attributes.content: Of course... I believe as much.
attributes.name: Gnosis

attributes.content: Such transnational cooperation is unprecedented in the history of Terra. It will undoubtedly produce its share of obstacles...
attributes.name: Gnosis

attributes.content: I simply wish to express that, as long as we proceed with due candor in the sharing of scientific information, we will be able to avoid the sort of accident that occurred in Trimounts.
attributes.name: Gnosis

attributes.content: Oh, I forgot to ask! Will the Saintess come and visit the station?
attributes.name: Muelsyse

attributes.content: I expect she will attend the opening ceremony once the facility is complete... is there a particular reason why you hope to meet her?
attributes.name: Gnosis

attributes.content: Oh, nothing serious, I'm just a curious critter.
attributes.name: Muelsyse

attributes.content: I kinda remember the Saintess wasn't too into our project, but then she flipped around and agreed, all of a sudden.
attributes.name: Muelsyse

attributes.content: I just wanna know what made her change her mind, and I figured that'd be a chance to ask.
attributes.name: Muelsyse

attributes.content: The Saintess has a very busy schedule. If you wish to meet her, you may want to attend some local ceremonies... if the fancy strikes.
attributes.name: Gnosis

attributes.content: The Saintess and the Vine-Bead Court would be very happy to receive you... let me know if you have such intentions, and I'll make the necessary arrangements.
attributes.name: Gnosis

attributes.content: Well, aren't you meticulous? You seem made for this job.
attributes.name: Muelsyse

attributes.content: I'm simply showing you proper Kjerag hospitality.
attributes.name: Gnosis

attributes.content: It's our mutual hope that this cooperation will be a fruitful one... free of trouble.
attributes.name: Gnosis

attributes.content: Much appreciated. Our project wouldn't be going so smoothly without your help.
attributes.name: Muelsyse

attributes.content: I would not call it help... we are simply trying to achieve the same goal.
attributes.name: Gnosis

attributes.content: Karlan Trade will connect the mountains of Kjerag for you, paving the roads and providing the necessary freedom for your activities.
attributes.name: Gnosis

attributes.content: In turn, Rhine Lab will share data from your studies of our local ecology, and assist with medical development.
attributes.name: Gnosis

attributes.content: The contract details have to go between Director Fitzroy and Karlan Trade, of course.
attributes.name: Muelsyse

attributes.content: I'm a researcher, not a diplomat. I just want you to know that Rhine Lab has come to this sacred place in good faith.
attributes.name: Muelsyse

attributes.content: On this, I think we are of the same mind.
attributes.name: Gnosis

attributes.content: They shake hands with nods and smiles, an image that could have served as a perfect press photo.
There is no need to worry...
attributes.name: Gnosis

attributes.content: We will continue along as 'friends,' assuming we both abide by our agreement.
attributes.name: Gnosis

attributes.content: The representatives of Karlan Trade are here, Elena.
attributes.name: Energy Section Researcher

attributes.content: They want to meet a representative of Rhine Lab as soon as possible.
attributes.name: Energy Section Researcher

attributes.content: Why? We don't have any scheduled meetings with Karlan Trade, do we?
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: ...Is it because of the Catastrophe?
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: Hm...
attributes.name: Energy Section Researcher

attributes.content: They want to discuss the cause, and at least obtain the data observed by the station.
attributes.name: Energy Section Researcher

attributes.content: Right...
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: Did you see Carolin anywhere? She's supposed to be in charge of the observation data, isn't she?
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: That's the other question I have for you.
attributes.name: Energy Section Researcher

attributes.content: No one's seen her since yesterday morning.
attributes.name: Energy Section Researcher

attributes.content: What?
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: Men with guns surrounding the station, demanding that all our researchers gather in the lobby for 'questioning.'
attributes.name: Muelsyse

attributes.content: Is this how Karlan Trade treats its friends, Mr. Edelweiss?
attributes.name: Muelsyse

attributes.content: The researchers stand around the spacious lobby in small groups.
Gnosis and the guards of Clan Silverash occupy the outside area near the door.
The two groups stand opposite one another, as though separated by an invisible river.
It's a request, not a demand... and it seems that not all your researchers are accounted for.
attributes.name: Gnosis

attributes.content: Who exactly are you looking for?
attributes.name: Muelsyse

attributes.content: A researcher who was spotted in a restricted military zone of Kjerag.
attributes.name: Gnosis

attributes.content: Gnosis scans the faces of the researchers one by one.
The strong guards stand silently while the researchers exchange wordless gazes.
...She is not here.
attributes.name: Gnosis

attributes.content: It seems that Rhine Lab is not fully aware of your researchers' whereabouts.
attributes.name: Gnosis

attributes.content: If you're accusing us of espionage, I'll ask that you submit your complaint through the official channels.
attributes.name: Muelsyse

attributes.content: We are unable to cooperate with impromptu investigations like so.
attributes.name: Muelsyse

attributes.content: Of course... there is another reason why I'm here.
attributes.name: Gnosis

attributes.content: I'm sure you've heard about the Catastrophe that occurred within Kjerag's borders several hours ago, something that has never before happened in our history.
attributes.name: Gnosis

attributes.content: Panic is spreading. The people's nerves are sensitive, and anything new may provoke a reaction... I'm sure you understand what I mean.
attributes.name: Gnosis

attributes.content: Should I trust that you're not one of the sensitive ones, Mr. Edelweiss?
attributes.name: Muelsyse

attributes.content: My views on this matter, and Karlan Trade's views, are not important at this time.
attributes.name: Gnosis

attributes.content: What is important is that the people want an explanation. I hope to work together with you to find the cause of this Catastrophe.
attributes.name: Gnosis

attributes.content: I'm afraid you'll be disappointed.
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: I just checked the station's observation logs. There was nothing out of the ordinary in the seventy-two hours preceding the Catastrophe.
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: So you're telling me that the observation station did not detect anything abnormal leading up to the first Catastrophe to strike this land in a thousand years?
attributes.name: Gnosis

attributes.content: That's the truth, at least based on our observation data.
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: Elena?
attributes.name: Muelsyse

attributes.content: It's alright. Mr. Edelweiss wants the truth. We'll give him the truth.
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: The primary objective of this observation station is to study the Starpod.
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: Current research shows no relationship between the Starpod and Catastrophes.
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: Similarly, any assertion that building an observation station here might bring Catastrophe to Kjerag is purely speculative with no basis in evidence.
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: (W-Wait a second, Elena! Now is not the time to be argumentative!)
attributes.name: Muelsyse

attributes.content: May I be frank?
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: ...You may.
attributes.name: Gnosis

attributes.content: The young woman's voice is calm, her gaze firm and unwavering.
I won't mince words, then.
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: This may run contrary to the Kjerag faith, but from a scientific perspective, so-called 'sudden' Catastrophes are not an abnormal occurrence.
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: It is the peace and quiet that Kjerag has enjoyed for so long, and the attitude of taking it for granted, that is truly abnormal.
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: The lobby is completely quiet. Elena's words echo to the end of the corridor.
When this observation station was first established, Rhine Lab considered adding a Catastrophe warning system.
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: Unfortunately, we placed too much trust in past experience, and did not consider the installation of this system to be a priority.
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: If we are to take remedial measures...
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: The real priority should be for Rhine Lab and Karlan Trade to go back to the negotiating table and establish an effective Catastrophe warning system in Kjerag as soon as possible.
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: ...A most astute observation, Miss.
attributes.name: Gnosis

attributes.content: I agree completely. Karlan Trade will make developing a Catastrophe warning system a top priority.
attributes.name: Gnosis

attributes.content: We would like to obtain a copy of the station's observation data from the past month... may we expect your cooperation?
attributes.name: Gnosis

attributes.content: Of course.
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: One moment, please.
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: *sigh*...
attributes.name: Muelsyse

attributes.content: I didn't know you had it in you, Elena.
attributes.name: Muelsyse

attributes.content: Sorry, Director Muelsyse... was I too hot-headed?
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: A little bit... maybe?
attributes.name: Muelsyse

attributes.content: I was just angry at how science has to explain for perceptions that are completely unscientific, no matter where we are...
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: We have to recognize that science can be a very distant thing for a lot of people.
attributes.name: Muelsyse

attributes.content: The people and the things that trouble us are part of this land. It's not something that we can ignore.
attributes.name: Muelsyse

attributes.content: Like Silence said, 'Science is a clear, incisive look at every one of us.'
attributes.name: Muelsyse

attributes.content: I know... but this is just so absurd—
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: Never mind that for now... let's get the data we need.
attributes.name: Muelsyse

attributes.content: Data, data... it's not like we'll find anything...
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: Wait... this graph—
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: Elena picks up the scattered papers, and notices the shape of a certain curve on a spectrogram.
This is impossible...
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: What is it?
attributes.name: Muelsyse

attributes.content: This machine is used to study the Starpod's structure, by bombarding it with high-powered particle beams and observing the resulting electromagnetic radiation...
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: But I just realized that the data obtained between 3-4 A.M. on December 7th is identical to the data from the same period on December 4th.
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: An unusual coincidence?
attributes.name: Muelsyse

attributes.content: No... it's impossible.
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: Just like how no two snowflakes are completely alike, atmospheric electromagnetic radiation is constantly changing.
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: There is only one possibility, if the exact same waveform is displayed during the same time period on two different days for an entire hour...
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: Someone altered these data.
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: Falsifying data to support a hypothesis? But people don't usually pull shenanigans like that until way later in a project...
attributes.name: Muelsyse

attributes.content: Got any idea who might have done it?
attributes.name: Muelsyse

attributes.content: December 7th... the day before the Catastrophe...
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: The one on observation duty was... Carolin.
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: Could it be...?
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: Angry shouts pierce through the metal walls.
Give Mount Karlan back to us! Back to Kjerag! Back to Kjeragandr!
attributes.name: Villager's Voice

attributes.content: Get off Kjeragandr's land!
attributes.name: Villager's Voice
